title: Material Property
description: Schema for a material property record. Captures a single measured physical property of a material with value, unit, test method, and evidence traceability.

property_id.description: Unique identifier for this property record.

material_ref.description: Reference to the parent material ID.

property_name.description: Name of the physical property (e.g., tensile_strength, elongation, r_value).

value.description: Measured property value. Numeric for quantitative properties; string for pass/fail or classification.

unit.description: Unit of measurement (e.g., psi, %, perms, hr·ft²·°F/BTU).

test_method_ref.description: Reference to the standards reference record ID for the test method.

conditions.description: Test conditions (temperature, humidity, age, substrate, etc.).

temperature_range.description: Temperature range for which the property value is valid.
